note: USD per million tokens, pinned at V4 freeze. Opus 4.8 from the Anthropic catalog (no intro pricing); GLM 5.2 from the OpenRouter /models catalog (z-ai/glm-5.2 standard variant). Cost is computed post-hoc from recorded token splits against this table, so an unpriced-in-litellm model can never leave a cell's cost at a silent $0.
